title: Can Xi Jinping Achieve His Ambitions After the Biden-Xi Summit?
description: Xi’s transformation from “wolf warrior” to “panda” was more about what came after the summit: a major gathering with American CEOs.
keywords: Economy, East Asia, China, Biden-Xi summit, U.S. investment in China, U.S.-China economic relations, U.S.-China Relations, Wolf Warrior diplomacy, Xi Jinping, Xi visit to the U.S.
snippet:
Xi’s transformation from “wolf warrior” to “panda” was more about what came after the summit: a major gathering with American CEOs.
